label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about how long the experiment lasted according to the text. Looking at the text, the study involved participants writing for three consecutive days, 20 minutes each day. Then, two weeks after the third day of writing, they had a skin biopsy. The wounds were monitored over the following days. The results mentioned that on the 11th day after the biopsy, the wounds had healed for some. Wait, the experiment duration might be a bit confusing here. The writing part was three days, but the healing process was observed over time. The key part is when they say "two weeks after the third day of writing, all participants received a biopsy." So the experiment wasn't just the three days of writing. The healing was tracked for 11 days
